verdict: Retargeting spend is fading to near zero with no leads, social, or pipeline data to judge results.
diagnosis: This period spent $599 on Facebook retargeting, dropping from $28/day average to $0.59 on the latest day, with no conversion data attached.

signals.headline: Facebook spend totaled $599 this period
signals.detail: All paid budget went to one retargeting campaign. No prospecting or new-audience layer is currently running.

signals.headline: Daily spend collapsed to $0.59
signals.detail: Latest day shows budget effectively switched off. Either intentional pause or a delivery issue worth checking immediately.

signals.headline: Zero lead or pipeline data tracked
signals.detail: No CRM, booking, or conversion signal is flowing in. Spend cannot be tied to trial sign-ups or members.

signals.headline: Retargeting-only mix, 100% of budget
signals.detail: Without a top-of-funnel feeder, retargeting audiences shrink. Lead volume will decay as warm pools exhaust.

signals.headline: No organic or local presence data
signals.detail: Google Business Profile and social activity are dark this period. Free discovery channels are unmeasured.

benchmark.label: Benchmark
benchmark.body: Fitness averages around <cite index="2-18">$29.70 cost per lead on Meta</cite>. <cite index="2-5,2-6,2-7">Budget gyms see $8–$15, mid-range $15–$30, boutique studios $25–$50</cite>. <cite index="4-5">Fitness conversion rates can reach 14.29%</cite>.

seasonal.label: Seasonal
seasonal.body: <cite index="2-29">April and May offer the best deals, with costs dipping up to 64% below global averages</cite>. <cite index="2-27">July marks the peak at $48.33</cite>. Acquisition push now is well-timed.

competitor.label: Competitor
competitor.body: <cite index="19-33,19-36,19-37">Retention is overtaking acquisition as ad costs rise on Meta and competition intensifies</cite>. <cite index="11-26">Studios saw cancellations drop 6% last year while gyms rose 8%</cite>.

recommendations.title: Check why daily spend dropped to under a dollar
recommendations.detail: Confirm whether the pause was intentional. If not, check billing, budget caps, and ad approval status. Restart delivery before retargeting pools go cold.

recommendations.title: Add a prospecting campaign to feed retargeting
recommendations.detail: Retargeting alone burns out warm audiences. Test a small top-of-funnel video campaign now while spring costs sit near yearly lows.

recommendations.title: Connect lead tracking before scaling spend
recommendations.detail: Wire up form submissions or booking data into reporting. Without cost-per-lead visibility, judging this campaign against the $15–$50 fitness benchmark is impossible.
